overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district at night. The character crosses multiple intersections and walks under elevated highways while surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers, digital billboards, and sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

events.description: pedestrian with red hair and dark clothing passes very close to the camera, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: following two pedestrians across a wide rain-soaked intersection toward a towering building with large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking steadily ahead of ego across the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall dark building with vertical red lighting strips and multiple large digital billboards displaying advertisements
massive illuminated screen showing a face advertisement on the side of the skyscraper
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes reflecting neon lights on the wet asphalt
tall metal pole with traffic signals and attached street lighting
street vendor setup with crates and goods under a small shelter near the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk intersection at night, with the camera following two pedestrians across a yellow-striped crosswalk. A massive tower with red vertical accents and glowing billboards dominates the view ahead, while neon reflections shimmer on the wet pavement. A pedestrian with red hair briefly passes close to the camera, causing a momentary occlusion.

events.description: moving from open intersection into covered area beneath elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under an elevated highway structure, passing digital advertisements and street furniture

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with orange neon strip lighting running along its underside
illuminated digital billboard displaying 'MINDFUCK' advertisement with purple neon colors and animated graphics
directional street sign indicating 'PACIFICA WEST WIND ESTATES' with white arrows
tall pole with bright white street lamp illuminating the sidewalk area
red neon sign with Japanese characters reading 'Fuyutsuki' on a distant building

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open intersection into a semi-covered sidewalk area beneath an elevated highway. The environment shifts to mixed lighting with orange neon strips on the concrete overpass above. The character passes a prominent digital kiosk displaying a 'MINDFUCK' advertisement and continues under the shelter of the highway structure.

events.description: entering crosswalk to cross the wide street toward the multi-level building with neon trim
black vehicle drives through the intersection, headlights reflecting on the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: crossing a wide wet street while vehicles pass by, heading toward a building with distinctive orange neon trim

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection, headlights cutting through the rain and reflecting on wet pavement

entered.detail: futuristic commercial building with multiple levels and prominent orange neon accent lighting on its edges
line of parked vehicles along the street curb with reflective wet surfaces
yellow pedestrian crossing lines painted on the wet asphalt with neon reflections
blue street sign suspended over the road indicating 'Blossom Ave'

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass and enters a wide intersection, crossing yellow-striped crosswalks toward a distinctive multi-level building with orange neon trim. Vehicles move through the intersection, their headlights creating reflections on the rain-slicked pavement. The environment opens up again to the rainy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown intersection with towering skyscrapers and vertical signage

events.description: camera pans upward to view the towering skyscrapers and vertical neon signs against the rainy night sky

agents.ego_description: moving through the intersection while looking up at the towering skyscrapers and vertical neon signage, taking in the cityscape

entered.detail: tall dark skyscraper covered in multiple vertical neon signs and illuminated advertisements
prominent vertical pink neon sign reading 'WNS NEWS 54' on the side of the skyscraper
illuminated advertisement display showing colorful graphics mounted at street level near a bench
pedestrian walkway or connecting bridge between buildings with illuminated underside

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character moving through the intersection while the camera pans upward to take in the massive scale of the surrounding architecture. A prominent skyscraper displays vertical neon signage including 'WNS NEWS 54' in bright pink. The scene emphasizes the verticality and density of the cyberpunk cityscape, with rain continuing to fall through the neon-lit night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked downtown district that shifts from a wide neon intersection into a sheltered underpass before opening back up to reveal the towering scale of the cityscape. It begins by following pedestrians across a yellow-striped crosswalk toward a massive tower with red accents, with neon reflections shimmering on the wet pavement as a red-haired passerby briefly obscures the view. As the character moves forward, the environment transitions from the open street into a semi-covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, where the lighting shifts to orange neon strips and a digital kiosk displaying a MINDFUCK advertisement appears. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the shelter and crosses another wide intersection toward a multi-level building with orange trim, with vehicle headlights cutting through the rain. Finally, the camera pans upward from the street level to capture the immense verticality of the surrounding architecture, highlighting a skyscraper with bright pink WNS NEWS 54 signage against the dark, rainy sky.
